name: agent-reach-monorepo
description: Anchor package so npm commands run from this repo, not $HOME. Use `cd nodepad-main && …` so Next runs with the correct cwd; see nodepad-main/next.config.mjs turbopack.resolveAlias if parent package.json breaks CSS resolution.

scripts.dev:stack: npx --yes concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "./.venv/bin/agent-reach research serve" "sh -c 'cd nodepad-main && exec npm run dev'"
scripts.dev:stack:webpack: npx --yes concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "./.venv/bin/agent-reach research serve" "sh -c 'cd nodepad-main && exec npm run dev:webpack'"
scripts.dev:stack:full: npx --yes concurrently -k -n api,worker,web -c cyan,yellow,magenta "./.venv/bin/agent-reach research serve" "./.venv/bin/agent-reach research worker run" "sh -c 'cd nodepad-main && exec npm run dev'"
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:python
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test
